description_long: This is a tall, wall-mounted radiator with a series of evenly spaced horizontal bars forming the main heating surface. The bars are tubular and connected by two vertical side rails, creating a ladder-like appearance. The radiator is finished in a dark, metallic color, likely a painted or powder-coated metal, giving it a sleek and modern look. At the bottom, there are visible pipe connections and a valve assembly, indicating where it connects to the heating system. The overall design is minimalist, with no decorative elements, focusing on functionality and efficient heat dissipation. The radiator is relatively slim in profile, projecting only slightly from the wall.
description: A tall, dark metallic wall-mounted radiator with horizontal tubular bars and visible bottom pipe connections. Its minimalist, ladder-like design is both functional and modern.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full array of horizontal bars, vertical rails, and bottom pipe connections.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile and how the radiator projects minimally from the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view, mostly obscured by the wall, with no visible radiator features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and mounting against the wall.
attribute_pipe_connections: two pipe connections at the bottom right, horizontally oriented
